text.title: Rails Decomposition Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure to apply the Service / Query / Form / Policy / Serializer decomposition end-to-end.

step.name: scaffold-namespaces
step.action: Create `app/services/`, `app/queries/`, `app/forms/`, `app/policies/`, `app/serializers/`. Lock the canonical Service return shape (Result vs entity-or-raise) in `CONTRIBUTING.md`. Register the whitelist in `decomp-rails-lint.sh`.

step.name: add-service-per-verb
step.action: For each domain verb create `<Domain>::<Verb>Service` with one `call` method returning the canonical entity or `Result`. Constructor takes plain Ruby keyword arguments; no Service-to-Service inline calls.

step.name: build-query-objects-on-scopes
step.input: Filter combinations needed by controllers / serializers
step.action: Identify filters that recur; encode as model scopes first. Wrap multi-scope compositions in a Query Object (`<Domain>::<Name>Query`). Re-implementing existing scopes is forbidden.
step.decision-gate: If a Query Object re-implements a scope, fail per `query-objects-reuse-scopes` rule.

step.name: add-form-and-serializer
step.action: For each non-trivial input shape add a Form Object via `ActiveModel::Model` + `ActiveModel::Attributes`. For each output contract add a Serializer with explicit attribute lists + per-attribute tests.
step.decision-gate: If a Serializer uses `as_json` or `attributes :all`, BLOCK per `serializer-explicit-attributes` rule.

step.name: wire-policies-and-lint
step.action: Add Pundit policies under `app/policies/`; controllers MUST use `policy_scope(Model).find(params[:id])`. Run `decomp-rails-lint.sh` in CI: enforce file-size budgets + namespace whitelist + forbidden patterns.
step.output: Authorization wired + lint gate in CI
step.decision-gate: If lint fails, BLOCK the merge.
